steps.t: Various stones can be found nearby in Asbaj-khîrfin. You should appraise each of the various stones.
Dargumë can be found in Asbaj-khîrfin. You should talk to Dargumë.
Banded gold can be found in northern Máttugard. You should collect banded gold.
Dargumë can be found at Asbaj-khîrfin. You should bring the banded gold to Dargumë.
